name: Wholewheat Spaghetti with Garlic, Hot Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1 large bunch Broccoli, cut into small florets
1 Dried hot red chili, broken into several pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti until it is half done; add the broccoli and continue cooking until both the pasta and broccoli are al dente.
2. Meanwhile, heat the garlic in the olive oil with the red chili over low heat.
3. When the garlic is golden, remove the pan from the heat and carefully remove the bits of chili using a slotted spoon.
4. Discard the chili and set the oil aside.
5. Drain the pasta and broccoli, then toss them with the reserved garlic.
6. Season with salt and pepper, and serve immediately.
